description_long: This is a modern, rectangular office desk with a dark wood grain finish and a broad, flat work surface. The front panel is solid, providing privacy and structural support, while the back features an open leg space and a set of three drawers on the left side for storage. The right side has an open shelf area, suitable for storing books, a computer tower, or other office supplies. The desk's top has a subtle ergonomic curve at the user's edge, enhancing comfort during use. Metal handles on the drawers add a touch of contrast and functionality. The overall design is sturdy and practical, making it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A dark wood office desk with three drawers on the left, an open shelf on the right, and a curved ergonomic front edge. The design is modern, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid privacy panel and the desk's broad, flat surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the desk's thickness and the subtle ergonomic curve of the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three drawers on the left, open shelf on the right, and ample legroom beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open shelf area and the desk's overall depth.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features a curved ergonomic edge, three drawers on the left, and an open shelf on the right, indicating the front of the desk.
